resources.string: Tints Virga to match your device wallpaper. Off keeps Virga\'s own blue-and-teal look.
Show advanced options in the task editor
Applied to new sync tasks; change per-task in the editor.
Format: 1M, 500k, 10G. Applied when metered connection is active.
Some manufacturers aggressively kill background apps, which can stop scheduled syncs. Exempt Virga from battery optimization and see dontkillmyapp.com for device-specific steps.

Runs a persistent background service with a quiet ongoing notification so scheduled syncs aren\'t killed on aggressive devices. Uses a little extra battery — leave off unless your syncs keep getting skipped.

Off by default. When on, anonymous crash reports (stack traces with file paths, remote names, and tokens stripped out) are sent to help fix bugs. No file contents, accounts, or sync data are ever sent.

Virga schedules sync tasks that run rclone in the background. Each task has a source and destination remote (a cloud drive, local folder, or SD card). Tasks run automatically when their conditions are met — Wi-Fi, charging state, or on a schedule.\n\nRemotes are configured using rclone\'s standard config. Virga stores the rclone config securely on-device. All sync operations run locally; no data passes through Virga\'s servers.
Virga is built with these open-source projects. Tap any item to view it. Thank you to their authors.
Virga needs all-files access to read and write the folders you sync. Grant it here if you skipped this during setup.
Couldn\'t open storage settings on this device
Couldn\'t open battery settings on this device
